canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>turing</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { 
  background: #0a0a0f; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  width: 100vw; 
  height: 100vh;
}
canvas { 
  display: block; 
  width: 100vw; 
  height: 100vh;
  image-rendering: pixelated;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="canvas"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

// Lower resolution for performance (reaction-diffusion is compute-heavy)
const scale = 4;
let width, height;
let gridA, gridB, nextA, nextB;

// Gray-Scott model parameters
const dA = 1.0;      // Diffusion rate A
const dB = 0.5;      // Diffusion rate B
const feed = 0.055;  // Feed rate
const kill = 0.062;  // Kill rate

let mouseX = -1000, mouseY = -1000;
let mouseDown = false;

function resize() {
  canvas.width = Math.floor(window.innerWidth / scale);
  canvas.height = Math.floor(window.innerHeight / scale);
  width = canvas.width;
  height = canvas.height;
  initGrid();
}

function initGrid() {
  gridA = new Float32Array(width * height);
  gridB = new Float32Array(width * height);
  nextA = new Float32Array(width * height);
  nextB = new Float32Array(width * height);
  
  // Fill with chemical A
  gridA.fill(1);
  gridB.fill(0);
  
  // Seed some initial B spots
  seedPattern();
}

function seedPattern() {
  // Create several random seed points
  for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
    const cx = Math.floor(Math.random() * width);
    const cy = Math.floor(Math.random() * height);
    const r = 3 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 5);
    
    for (let dy = -r; dy <= r; dy++) {
      for (let dx = -r; dx <= r; dx++) {
        if (dx*dx + dy*dy <= r*r) {
          const x = (cx + dx + width) % width;
          const y = (cy + dy + height) % height;
          const idx = y * width + x;
          gridB[idx] = 1;
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

function seedAt(x, y) {
  const gx = Math.floor(x / scale);
  const gy = Math.floor(y / scale);
  const r = 4;
  
  for (let dy = -r; dy <= r; dy++) {
    for (let dx = -r; dx <= r; dx++) {
      if (dx*dx + dy*dy <= r*r) {
        const px = (gx + dx + width) % width;
        const py = (gy + dy + height) % height;
        const idx = py * width + px;
        gridB[idx] = 1;
      }
    }
  }
}

function laplacian(grid, x, y) {
  const idx = y * width + x;
  const left = y * width + ((x - 1 + width) % width);
  const right = y * width + ((x + 1) % width);
  const up = ((y - 1 + height) % height) * width + x;
  const down = ((y + 1) % height) * width + x;
  
  // 5-point stencil
  return grid[left] + grid[right] + grid[up] + grid[down] - 4 * grid[idx];
}

function simulate() {
  // Mouse influence on parameters
  const mx = Math.floor(mouseX / scale);
  const my = Math.floor(mouseY / scale);
  
  for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
      const idx = y * width + x;
      const a = gridA[idx];
      const b = gridB[idx];
      
      const lapA = laplacian(gridA, x, y);
      const lapB = laplacian(gridB, x, y);
      
      // Distance to mouse for local parameter variation
      const dx = x - mx;
      const dy = y - my;
      const dist = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);
      
      // Mouse proximity slightly alters kill rate (creates pattern variation)
      const killMod = dist < 30 ? kill + 0.003 * (1 - dist/30) : kill;
      
      const reaction = a * b * b;
      
      nextA[idx] = a + (dA * lapA - reaction + feed * (1 - a));
      nextB[idx] = b + (dB * lapB + reaction - (killMod + feed) * b);
      
      // Clamp values
      nextA[idx] = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, nextA[idx]));
      nextB[idx] = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, nextB[idx]));
    }
  }
  
  // Swap buffers
  [gridA, nextA] = [nextA, gridA];
  [gridB, nextB] = [nextB, gridB];
}

function render() {
  const imageData = ctx.createImageData(width, height);
  const data = imageData.data;
  
  for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
      const idx = y * width + x;
      const pixelIdx = idx * 4;
      
      const a = gridA[idx];
      const b = gridB[idx];
      
      // Color mapping: B concentration drives the pattern
      // Low B = background, High B = pattern
      const t = b;
      const t2 = t * t;
      const t3 = t2 * t;
      
      // Background: deep purple/black
      // Pattern: pink to cyan gradient based on local variation
      const variation = Math.abs(laplacian(gridB, x, y)) * 2;
      
      // Base colors
      let r, g, bl;
      
      if (t < 0.3) {
        // Background - deep void with subtle purple
        r = Math.floor(10 + t * 30);
        g = Math.floor(8 + t * 15);
        bl = Math.floor(20 + t * 40);
      } else {
        // Pattern emerges - pink to cyan based on concentration
        const patternT = (t - 0.3) / 0.7;
        
        // Pink: 255, 50, 150
        // Cyan: 0, 255, 255
        // Purple edge: 150, 50, 200
        
        if (variation > 0.1) {
          // Edges glow cyan
          r = Math.floor(30 + 80 * (1 - patternT));
          g = Math.floor(180 + 75 * patternT);
          bl = Math.floor(200 + 55 * patternT);
        } else {
          // Core is pink/magenta
          r = Math.floor(180 + 75 * patternT);
          g = Math.floor(30 + 50 * patternT);
          bl = Math.floor(120 + 80 * patternT);
        }
      }
      
      data[pixelIdx] = r;
      data[pixelIdx + 1] = g;
      data[pixelIdx + 2] = bl;
      data[pixelIdx + 3] = 255;
    }
  }
  
  ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
}

let frameCount = 0;

function animate() {
  // Run multiple simulation steps per frame for faster evolution
  for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
    simulate();
  }
  
  render();
  
  // Continuous seeding when mouse is held
  if (mouseDown) {
    seedAt(mouseX, mouseY);
  }
  
  frameCount++;
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

// Event listeners
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouseX = e.clientX;
  mouseY = e.clientY;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
  mouseDown = true;
  seedAt(e.clientX, e.clientY);
});

canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
  mouseDown = false;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
  mouseX = -1000;
  mouseY = -1000;
  mouseDown = false;
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  mouseX = touch.clientX;
  mouseY = touch.clientY;
  mouseDown = true;
  seedAt(mouseX, mouseY);
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  mouseX = touch.clientX;
  mouseY = touch.clientY;
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchend', () => {
  mouseDown = false;
  mouseX = -1000;
  mouseY = -1000;
});

// Initialize
resize();
animate();
</script>
</body>
</html>
